components.name: AvatarStoryDemoComponent
components.template:
Gravitas Avatar

Compact identity primitive for people, assignees, account chips, table rows, comments, headers, and lightweight admin UI surfaces.

Initials
Image avatars
Shapes
Fallback behavior
Sizes
In context
Simón Tang
Agency Owner
Active
Team row example
Caitlin Morris
Senior Coordinator
Toronto
Andrés Rojas
Broker
Remote
components.sourceCode:
import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/angular'; import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { Avatar } from './avatar'; @Component({ selector: 'gv-avatar-demo', standalone: true, imports: [Avatar], template: `
Gravitas Avatar

Compact identity primitive for people, assignees, account chips, table rows, comments, headers, and lightweight admin UI surfaces.

Initials
Image avatars
Shapes
Fallback behavior
Sizes
In context
Simón Tang
Agency Owner
Active
Team row example
Caitlin Morris
Senior Coordinator
Toronto
Andrés Rojas
Broker
Remote
`, }) class AvatarStoryDemoComponent {} const meta: Meta = { title: 'Gravitas/Avatar', component: AvatarStoryDemoComponent, tags: ['autodocs'], parameters: { docs: { description: { component: ` Identity primitive for people, assignees, account chips, comments, and table rows. Avatar supports image, initials, and projected fallback content. Prefer passing a real \`alt\` value when the avatar conveys unique identity, and use initials as the default fallback for dense enterprise layouts. `.trim(), }, }, }, }; export default meta; type Story = StoryObj; export const Default: Story = {};

components.name: CheckboxStoryDemoComponent
components.template:
Gravitas Checkbox

Premium, form-friendly checkbox control for settings panels, filters, table bulk actions, and admin-style forms.

Basic
Sizes
Indeterminate and disabled
Helper and error text
Settings panel example

propertiesClass.name: settings

components.sourceCode:
import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/angular'; import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { FormsModule } from '@angular/forms'; import { Checkbox } from './checkbox'; @Component({ selector: 'gv-checkbox-demo', standalone: true, imports: [FormsModule, Checkbox], template: `
Gravitas Checkbox

Premium, form-friendly checkbox control for settings panels, filters, table bulk actions, and admin-style forms.

Basic
Sizes
Indeterminate and disabled
Helper and error text
Settings panel example
`, }) class CheckboxStoryDemoComponent { notifications = true; emailUpdates = false; smallChecked = true; mediumChecked = false; largeChecked = true; termsAccepted = false; settings = { email: true, browser: true, weekly: false, }; } const meta: Meta = { title: 'Gravitas/Checkbox', component: CheckboxStoryDemoComponent, tags: ['autodocs'], parameters: { docs: { description: { component: ` Binary form control for independent selections such as settings, preferences, consent, and bulk actions. Checkbox is best when multiple options can be selected independently. Use \`description\`, \`helperText\`, and \`errorText\` to keep the control self-explanatory in dense forms. `.trim(), }, }, }, }; export default meta; type Story = StoryObj; export const Default: Story = {};

components.name: DividerStoryDemoComponent
components.template:
Gravitas Divider

Subtle section separator for cards, toolbars, dropdowns, panels, and settings layouts.

Horizontal
Section above
Section below
With label
Account settings
Danger zone
Inset
Header content
Body content
Vertical
Overview Analytics Exports
components.sourceCode:
import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/angular'; import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { Divider } from './divider'; @Component({ selector: 'gv-divider-demo', standalone: true, imports: [Divider], template: `
Gravitas Divider

Subtle section separator for cards, toolbars, dropdowns, panels, and settings layouts.

Horizontal
Section above
Section below
With label
Account settings
Danger zone
Inset
Header content
Body content
Vertical
Overview Analytics Exports
`, }) class DividerStoryDemoComponent {} const meta: Meta = { title: 'Gravitas/Divider', component: DividerStoryDemoComponent, tags: ['autodocs'], parameters: { docs: { description: { component: ` Low-emphasis structural separator for cards, toolbars, menus, settings sections, and split content layouts. Use horizontal dividers to separate stacked sections and vertical dividers for dense toolbar grouping. Add a label only when the separation itself needs semantic meaning. `.trim(), }, }, }, }; export default meta; type Story = StoryObj; export const Default: Story = {};

components.name: IconButtonStoryDemoComponent
components.template:
Gravitas Icon Button

Compact icon-only button for utility actions, row controls, toolbar items, close buttons, and lightweight contextual interactions.

Variants
Sizes
Shapes
States
Toolbar example
components.sourceCode:
import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/angular'; import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { IconButton } from './icon-button'; @Component({ selector: 'gv-icon-button-demo', standalone: true, imports: [IconButton], template: `
Gravitas Icon Button

Compact icon-only button for utility actions, row controls, toolbar items, close buttons, and lightweight contextual interactions.

Variants
Sizes
Shapes
States
Toolbar example
`, }) class IconButtonStoryDemoComponent {} const meta: Meta = { title: 'Gravitas/Icon Button', component: IconButtonStoryDemoComponent, tags: ['autodocs'], parameters: { docs: { description: { component: ` Icon-only action button for toolbars, row actions, overlays, compact controls, and secondary utility affordances. Use \`ariaLabel\` for every instance because the icon alone is not sufficient accessible text. Combine \`variant\` with \`appearance\` to keep the action semantically clear while fitting the surrounding surface density. `.trim(), }, }, }, }; export default meta; type Story = StoryObj; export const Default: Story = {};

components.name: RadioStoryDemoComponent
components.template:
Gravitas Radio

Premium radio control for single-choice selections in forms, pricing plans, settings panels, and dashboard filters.

Basic group
Selected: {{ selectedStatus }}
Sizes
Disabled states
Helper and error text
Plan selector example
Selected plan: {{ selectedPlan }}
components.sourceCode:
import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/angular'; import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { FormsModule } from '@angular/forms'; import { Radio } from './radio'; @Component({ selector: 'gv-radio-demo', standalone: true, imports: [FormsModule, Radio], template: `
Gravitas Radio

Premium radio control for single-choice selections in forms, pricing plans, settings panels, and dashboard filters.

Basic group
Selected: {{ selectedStatus }}
Sizes
Disabled states
Helper and error text
Plan selector example
Selected plan: {{ selectedPlan }}
`, }) class RadioStoryDemoComponent { selectedStatus = 'active'; smallChoice = 'sm'; mediumChoice = 'md'; largeChoice = 'lg'; disabledExample = 'enabled'; billingCycle = 'annual'; selectedPlan = 'growth'; } const meta: Meta = { title: 'Gravitas/Radio', component: RadioStoryDemoComponent, tags: ['autodocs'], parameters: { docs: { description: { component: ` Single-choice form control for mutually exclusive options such as filters, plans, modes, and settings selections. Use radio when the user must choose exactly one option from a small visible set. Keep related radios grouped by a shared \`name\` and pair them with helpful descriptions when the choices are nuanced. `.trim(), }, }, }, }; export default meta; type Story = StoryObj; export const Default: Story = {};

components.name: SwitchStoryDemoComponent
components.template:
Gravitas Switch

Premium toggle control for settings, permissions, notifications, and lightweight binary preferences in dashboard interfaces.

Basic
Sizes
Disabled and helper states
Error state
Settings panel example

propertiesClass.name: settings

components.sourceCode:
import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/angular'; import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { FormsModule } from '@angular/forms'; import { Switch } from './switch'; @Component({ selector: 'gv-switch-demo', standalone: true, imports: [FormsModule, Switch], template: `
Gravitas Switch

Premium toggle control for settings, permissions, notifications, and lightweight binary preferences in dashboard interfaces.

Basic
Sizes
Disabled and helper states
Error state
Settings panel example
`, }) class SwitchStoryDemoComponent { notifications = true; browserAlerts = false; smallOn = true; mediumOn = false; largeOn = true; weeklySummary = true; settings = { email: true, push: false, renewals: true, }; } const meta: Meta = { title: 'Gravitas/Switch', component: SwitchStoryDemoComponent, tags: ['autodocs'], parameters: { docs: { description: { component: ` Binary toggle for immediate on or off preferences such as notifications, permissions, and lightweight settings. Switch is best when the control represents a live toggleable state rather than a submit-later form choice. Use helper or description text when the impact of turning the setting on is not obvious. `.trim(), }, }, }, }; export default meta; type Story = StoryObj; export const Default: Story = {};

Helper, error, and max length
Disabled and readonly
Resize modes
In context

propertiesClass.name: readonlyValue
propertiesClass.defaultValue: 'This content is readonly and can still be selected.'

components.sourceCode:
import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/angular'; import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { FormsModule } from '@angular/forms'; import { Textarea } from './textarea'; @Component({ selector: 'gv-textarea-demo', standalone: true, imports: [FormsModule, Textarea], template: `
Gravitas Textarea

Premium multiline text input for notes, descriptions, comments, and structured admin workflows.

Basic
Sizes
Helper, error, and max length
Disabled and readonly
Resize modes
In context
`, }) class TextareaStoryDemoComponent { notes = ''; description = ''; clientNote = 'Policy renewal discussion scheduled for next week.'; readonlyValue = 'This content is readonly and can still be selected.'; disabledValue = 'This content is disabled.'; claimSummary = ''; } const meta: Meta = { title: 'Gravitas/Textarea', component: TextareaStoryDemoComponent, tags: ['autodocs'], parameters: { docs: { description: { component: ` Multiline text input for notes, comments, explanations, summaries, and admin workflow fields that need more space than a standard input. Textarea supports helper text, errors, readonly and disabled states, resize behavior, and character counting. Use it for narrative content, not for structured lists of many separate values. `.trim(), }, }, }, }; export default meta; type Story = StoryObj; export const Default: Story = {};

components.name: TooltipStoryDemoComponent
components.template:
Gravitas Tooltip

Quiet, premium tooltip styling for dashboards, forms, tables, and actions. Supports placement, trigger modes, disabled state, and compact text wrapping.

Status badge Hover or focus this text
components.sourceCode:
import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/angular'; import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { GvTooltipDirective } from './tooltip-directive'; @Component({ selector: 'gv-tooltip-demo', standalone: true, imports: [GvTooltipDirective], template: `
Gravitas Tooltip

Quiet, premium tooltip styling for dashboards, forms, tables, and actions. Supports placement, trigger modes, disabled state, and compact text wrapping.

Status badge Hover or focus this text
`, }) class TooltipStoryDemoComponent {} const meta: Meta = { title: 'Gravitas/Tooltip', component: TooltipStoryDemoComponent, tags: ['autodocs'], parameters: { docs: { description: { component: ` Contextual helper overlay for short supporting copy on icon buttons, truncated labels, status chips, and compact dashboard affordances. Tooltip is best for supplemental information, not required instructions. Keep the message brief, choose the lightest trigger that still works, and avoid putting critical workflow content only inside a tooltip. `.trim(), }, }, }, }; export default meta; type Story = StoryObj; export const Default: Story = {};

    filterPlaceholder: 'Search records...',
    pagination: true,
    pageSize: 5,
    pageSizeOptions,
    rowLimit: null,
    loading: false,
    emptyText: 'No records found.',
    className: '',
    striped: false,
    hover: true,
    compact: false,
  },
  argTypes: {
    columns: { control: false },
    rows: { control: false },
    pageSizeOptions: { control: false },
    className: { control: 'text' },
    pageSize: { control: 'number' },
    rowLimit: { control: 'number' },
    filterable: { control: 'boolean' },
    showColumnFilters: { control: 'boolean' },
    pagination: { control: 'boolean' },
    loading: { control: 'boolean' },

    docs: {
      description: {
        component: `
Data table for dense operational views with sorting, search, column filters, pagination, and empty or loading states.

This table is optimized for enterprise dashboard usage where scanability matters more than heavy customization. Define behavior through the column configuration object and keep row values predictable and serializable.
        `.trim(),
      },
    },
  },
}

  title: 'Gravitas/Table',
  component: Table,
  tags: ['autodocs'],
  args: {
    columns,

    showColumnFilters: { control: 'boolean' },
    pagination: { control: 'boolean' },
    loading: { control: 'boolean' },
    striped: { control: 'boolean' },

    compact: { control: 'boolean' },
  },
  parameters: {
    docs: {
      description: {
        component: `
Data table for dense operational views with sorting, search, column filters, pagination, and empty or loading states.

This table is optimized for enterprise dashboard usage where scanability matters more than heavy customization. Define behavior through the column configuration object and keep row values predictable and serializable.
        `.trim(),
      },
    },
  },
}
